title: Arachnites alpinus
taxonomy: Arachnites alpinus is classified within the family Orchidaceae. This family includes the orchid genus, which comprises approximately 30,000 species. Arachnites alpinus, specifically, is a genus of orchids with only one known species. The classification also places Arachnites alpinus within the subfamily Orchidoideae and further within the tribe Orchideae. The tribe Orchideae is a large group within the Orchidoideae subfamily.

intro: Arachnites alpinus is a type of flowering plant, specifically a species of orchid, native to the mountainous regions of Europe and Asia. The plant is valued for its potential health benefits, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it useful in treating wounds and skin conditions. The bioactive constituents of Arachnites alpinus include flavonoids, phenolic acids, and terpenoids, which are responsible for its medicinal properties.
